case_title: RIVAS, SALVADOR vs. MILLER, MICHAEL, INDV. DBA CREATIVE COLOR OF CALIF

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVAS, SALVADOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, MICHAEL, INDV. DBA CREATIVE COLOR OF CALIF $571.76 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $654.76
